title: Fix VIP discount handling in checkout totals
ticket: VIP customers should receive a 10% discount on taxable items only. Free shipping remains based on the pre-discount subtotal. Keep the change focused on pricing logic and document assumptions, risks, and tests.

acceptance_criteria.text: Apply the VIP discount only to taxable items.
Evaluate free shipping using the pre-discount subtotal.
Preserve cent-level rounding in the returned totals.
